compression.zstd/ZstdFile/name.name: name
compression.zstd/ZstdFile/name.description: The name of the Zstandard file. Equivalent to the name attribute of the underlying file object.

info.excerpt: The name of the Zstandard file. Equivalent to the name attribute of the underlying file object.

compression.zstd/CompressionParameter/nb.name: nb_workers
compression.zstd/CompressionParameter/nb.description: Select how many threads will be spawned to compress in parallel. When nb_workers > 0, enables multi-threaded compression, a value of 1 means “one-thread multi-threaded mode”. More workers improve speed, but also increase memory usage and slightly reduce compression ratio. A value of zero disables multi-threading.

compression.zstd/ZstdDecompressor/needs_.name: needs_input
compression.zstd/ZstdDecompressor/needs_.description: False if the decompress() method can provide more decompressed data before requiring new compressed input.

info.excerpt: False if the decompress() method can provide more decompressed data before requiring new compressed input.
